description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and build. The lint job should run in a matrix of linters (lint, checkdoc, mypy) on an ubuntu-latest environment, using a docker container with python, and run tox with the corresponding linter environment. The build job should run in a matrix of Python versions (py36, py37, ..., py310) with uvloop variants, using a docker container with python, and run tox with the corresponding environment, waiting for a rabbitmq service to be available.
